visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with white lettering, located in the front center of the shelf.
A green soda can, located to the left of and slightly behind the red soda can.
A brown plastic bottle with a blue cap, located to the far left on the shelf.
A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind the red and white cans.
A white can with purple graphics, located to the right of the red soda can.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is clearly visible and unobstructed, making it directly accessible.
